one_time_description: Grant from sale of Ridley Terminal - non-recurring capital grant of $4,200,000
economic_notes: GBEs include Kitselas Development Corporation (100%), Kitselas Forest Products Limited (100%), Kitselas Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), and Kitselas Forestry Limited Partnership (99.9%). Combined GBE revenue of ~$4.4M and net income of ~$769K equity-accounted. Guarantee of $520,000 RBC demand loan for Kitselas Forestry Limited Partnership.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Large one-time item: $4.2M grant from sale of Ridley Terminal significantly inflated revenue and surplus vs prior year. Prior year (2019) also had large non-recurring items including $12.8M from Province of BC and $3.3M proponent funding, resulting in $16.3M surplus. GBEs (4 entities) accounted for on modified equity basis - not fully consolidated. No schedule of remuneration provided. Replacement reserve ($475,327) and operating reserve ($454,008) are included within liabilities as restricted cash components. Ottawa Trust funds ($4,350) also held. Licences of $180,000 added in 2020. Allowance for doubtful accounts of $1,526,761 mainly related to housing rental receivables. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + DFO + FNHA + Natural Resources Canada + Province of BC + TFN Treaty Society + BC FN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
